start_msg:
👋 Hello! Here you can collect unique cards and compete with other players How to get cards?
send "/roll" command
Need help with bot features?
send "/help" command
Learn all features using /help
roll_cooldown: ⏳ The next card will be available in: %s
error_tech: 🔧 Technical error occurred. The database is resting, please try again later.
roll_mythic_assembled: 🔥 EPIC LUCK! You have assembled all 10 fragments! Obtained Mythical Card: %s ⚔️ Power: %d 🪙 Points: +%d
roll_mythic_fragment: 🔮 You found a Mythical Card fragment: %s! Fragments collected: %d / 10 🪙 Points: +%d
profile_caption: 👤 You are - %s %s 🃏 You have %d out of %d cards ♻️ Duplicates for craft: %d 🪙 You have %d points 🔥 Your streak is %d days
cards_empty: Oops! Your inventory is empty. Use /roll to get cards!
card_nav_caption: 🃏 %s ✨ Rarity: %s ⚔️ Power: %d 📦 You have: %d pcs. Card %d of %d
err_top_private: ❌ Local top only works in groups. Add me to your chat to compete with friends!
err_duel_private: ❌ Duels are only possible in groups!
err_duel_amount: 💰 Please specify a valid points amount.
err_duel_not_found: 🔍 Player @%s not found in the database. They must use /roll at least once.
err_duel_self: 🤡 Challenging yourself is a questionable idea.
duel_challenge: ⚔️ DUEL CHALLENGE 👤 %s is challenging @%s to a fight! 💰 Bet: %d points
duel_cancelled: 🚫 Duel between %s and %s has been cancelled.
duel_result: ⚔️ DUEL RESULT 🅰️ %s played: └ %s (Power: %d) — %.1f%% 🅱️ %s played: └ %s (Power: %d) — %.1f%% 🎲 Dice roll: %.1f 🏆 Winner: %s 💰 Prize: %d points
craft_success: ⚒ SUCCESSFUL CRAFT! You smelted %d duplicates and got: 🃏 Card: %s ✨ Rarity: %s ⚔️ Power: %d
craft_mythic_frag: ⚒ SUCCESSFUL CRAFT! You smelted %d legendary duplicates and got a Mythical Card fragment: 🔮 %s 📦 Collected: %d / 10
craft_mythic_assembled: ⚒ MYTHICAL CRAFT! You smelted %d duplicates and assembled the final fragment! 🔥 Obtained Mythical Card: %s ⚔️ Power: %d
shop_menu_text: 🛒 Rolls Shop Choose a package. Premium rolls ignore the cooldown timer and do not reset your free roll timer!
shop_desc_100: 100 rolls and a guaranteed random Epic card fragment!
err_payment_db: ⚠️ Payment successful, but a database error occurred. Contact the admin!
payment_test_refund: 🛠 TEST: Payment successful. Stars refunded to admin!
payment_success: ✅ Payment successfully completed! You received Premium Rolls: %d ⭐️%s Use /roll to play right now!
help_main: 📖 Bot Help Welcome to our Hentai Gacha! Here you can collect unique cards, earn points, and compete with friends. Main commands: /roll — get a new card /profile — your inventory and balance /top — group leaderboards /globaltop — global leaderboards /duel @user bet — challenge to a duel /craft — smelt duplicates Choose a section below to learn more.
help_cards: 🎴 How do cards work? Once every 3 hours you can use /roll. The bot gives a random card and 🪙 Points. 🌟 Fragments: Mythical cards drop as Fragments. Collect 10 to get a whole card in your inventory!
help_rarities: ✨ Card Rarities ⚪️ Common 🟢 Uncommon 🔵 Rare 🟣 Epic 🟡 Legendary 🔴 Mythical (Fragment Crafting / Luck) The higher the rarity, the higher the card's Power, which is useful in duels!
help_streaks: 🔥 Streaks Log in every day and use /roll. Your Streak grows daily, increasing bonus 🪙 Points for each roll. ⚠️ If you miss a day, the streak resets.
help_pity: 🛡 Pity System If you're unlucky for a long time, the Pity System activates. Each rare category has a counter: when full, a rare card drops with a 100% chance. When a rare card drops, the counter for that rarity resets.
help_duel: ⚔️ Point Duels Use command: /duel @username bet How it works: 1. The bot selects one random card from each player's inventory. 2. Win chance depends on the Power of the selected cards (higher rarity = higher power). 3. The winner takes the loser's bet.
help_craft: ⚒ Duplicate Crafting Don't know what to do with extra copies? Use command: /craft Crafting Prices: • 5 duplicates of one rarity = 1 random card of the next rarity. • 15 Legendary duplicates = 1 Mythical card fragment. ⚠️ Important: - The bot automatically uses the cheapest available duplicates. - The original card (1 copy) always stays with you; only extra copies are burned. - Mythical cards cannot be dismantled.
suggest_err_funds: You need more than 1000 points to suggest a card!
suggest_rules: Suggestion Rules: 💰 Choose wisely, as this service costs 1,000 points (deducted upon successful submission). 🔄 You can suggest new cards as well as replacements for current ones if you found a better art! ⛔️ Jokes, off-topic content, and spam will lead to a ban from the bot. ‼️ We will review your submission, but suggesting a card does not guarantee it will be added to the game. 👌 It is recommended to send photos in 3:4 format (vertical rectangle), preferably with some empty space around the edges so the frame doesn't cut off the character.
suggest_q1: Question 1/3: I want to send a funny photo of my classmate, is that okay?
suggest_q2: Question 2/3: I have a really cool card. If I suggest it, will you 100% add it to the bot?
btn_q2_no: ⛔️ No, but the chance is high
suggest_q3: Question 3/3: What is the preferred aspect ratio for the photo?
suggest_fail: ❌ Incorrect answer. Please read the rules above carefully and try again.
suggest_success: 😹 Quiz passed! Send your photo (or file), card name, and desired rarity in a single message (as a caption to the media). Cost: 1000 points
suggest_err_no_caption: ⚠️ You forgot to add a caption! Please resend the photo/file and include the card name and desired rarity in the caption field.
suggest_done: ✅ Your card has been successfully sent for moderation! 1000 points deducted from your balance. Thanks for your contribution!
help_language: 🌍 Language Selection / Выбор языка Select interface language. This will change the language of all bot buttons and messages.
streak_started:
🔥 Success! You started a streak
Use /roll daily — the streak grows even on cooldown. You will get bonuses for keeping the streak.
Current streak: 1 day
streak_continued:
🔥 Success! You continued your streak
Points: 🪙 +%d Current streak: %d days
streak_kept_alive: 🔥 Streak saved! Current streak extended to: %d days
link_code_msg: 🔗 Discord Account Linking Your one-time code is: %s ⏳ The code is valid for 5 minutes. Open our Discord bot and send the following command: /link %s
link_already_done: ✅ Your account is already linked to Discord!
promo_err_not_found: ❌ Promo code not found or invalid.
promo_err_limit: ❌ The activation limit for this promo code has been reached.
promo_err_used: ❌ You have already activated this promo code.
